entry.em: ..FLOOD WATCH IN EFFECT UNTIL NOON CST TODAY

entry.data:
SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
PATCHY FOG
SOME THUNDERSTORMS MAY PRODUCE HEAVY RAINFALL
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE AROUND 60
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN NEAR 100 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
PATCHY FOG IN THE MORNING
SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING, THEN A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
SOME THUNDERSTORMS MAY PRODUCE HEAVY RAINFALL IN THE MORNING
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING SOUTHWEST IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
PATCHY FOG AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
SHOWERS, MAINLY IN THE MORNING
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS AROUND 60
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT
